Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3129, Lot 33057 — Ancients
ACHAEMENID PERSIA. Xerxes II-Artaxerxes II (5th-4th centuries BC). AV daric (16mm, 8.30 gm). NGC MS★ 5/5 - 5/5. Sardes, ca. 420-375 BC. Persian king or hero, wearing cidaris and candys, in kn
sales.description:
Ancients
ACHAEMENID PERSIA. Xerxes II-Artaxerxes II (5th-4th centuries BC). AV daric (16mm, 8.30 gm). NGC MS★ 5/5 - 5/5. Sardes, ca. 420-375 BC. Persian king or hero, wearing cidaris and candys, in kneeling-running stance right, quiver over shoulder, body without indentations at waistline, dagger pointed at waist in right hand, bow outward in left / Irregular rectangular incuse punch with textured interior surfaces. Carradice Type IV, Group B (unlisted in gold, but examples now known from rece...
